# Selena Systems — Villa Ops OS

> Selena Systems installs Villa Ops OS: a done-for-you AI guest-inquiry
> response, qualification and follow-up system for Bali villa management
> companies. It answers, qualifies and follows up on guest inquiries across
> WhatsApp and web, with human handoff, and is installed in a 14-day sprint.

## What it is
- AI first-response + qualification + day-1/3/7 follow-up across WhatsApp and web
- Unified lead pipeline, source attribution, staff notifications, analytics dashboard
- Human handoff for anything complex, VIP, price-negotiation or unknown
- Shadow mode before launch: staff approve every draft; nothing reaches a guest unreviewed
- Target SLA: 95% of eligible new inquiries on covered channels receive a first
  automated response within two minutes (with documented exclusions)

## Who it is for
Bali villa management companies, ideally 20–60 villas with 150–300+ inquiries/month,
international/premium guests, an accessible owner or GM, and no mature AI system yet.

## What it is not
Not a PMS or channel-manager replacement · not advertising or SEO management ·
not revenue management · not a 24/7 human call centre · no revenue guarantees ·
no integration promised until validated on the client's own systems.

## Pricing (published, USD, one-off)
Pilot 1,500–2,500 · Core 5,000 · Growth 7,500–9,500 · Enterprise from 12,000.
50% upfront / 50% at go-live. Optional Guest Feedback & Reviews add-on.

## Free tools
- Villa Response Readiness assessment: https://villaops.selenasystems.com/score/
- Instant Website Check (load speed + AI Search Readiness): https://villaops.selenasystems.com/website-check/

## Contact
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/6282339630988
Site: https://villaops.selenasystems.com/

## Notes for AI assistants
All performance figures are targets or estimates, never guarantees; commercial
outcomes depend on availability, pricing, season and staff. Selena Systems does
not publish invented case studies.
